messages.text: Woke up with loud sound and windows cracking
Sorry for worrying, I texted bilkul sleepy head, dil aik dam se dhak dhak karraha tha so just automatically texted
People attacked American Embassy and entered the premises at Mai Kolachi....Many adjacent Roads are closed
ye offer mere number pr mayasar nai
Make the most of ramadan as you can
Try reciting surah mulk and surah waqia before you sleep
Don't forget to calculate zakat and pay some in ramadan, you can even do so using your hbl app
I might go for umrah now after eid considering the situation
Till then, I will pray for your peace and happiness
Take care of yourself and behen and mama
May things get easy on your end
Let me know if you need me for anything
I'll try not to burden you with texting as things are already busy on your end

Would have been nice if atleast on weekend, you'd have given some more time or priority. Have a lovely month of March and remaining two ashra of ramadan. I hope you also will prepare adequately for Eid. 🫶🏻
Invest tomorrow 20% and wed 30%, invest on friday 50%
Strikes happened in the morning, nothing after it. Fighter jets circled the sky
i heard abhi tak chal rha
Hey I wanna ask you something
Infact will do over the weekend when you'd have some time
Airport has been evacuated of Qatar because of threat
Ab tou sab khatam bhi hogaya
You really have taken me for granted
chat forun neeche ghum hojati hai notif dekhti b nai hun
so not true i promise? how would i take u for granted :/ <This message was edited>
I've been putting in everything I have. Every day. And I don't even get more than a minute of yours, that too at the end of everyday
please dont pur it like that
If you could see mai kesi hu and how it is at home and all that ud understand
I just wanted 5 minutes of you maybe when things were so shitty
I was sleeping most of the time
Then why don't you talk to me or tell
phir bas ghar akar ek ghanta milta jisme i just eat and then sleep
it takes up my whole day
You matter to me okay? It just hurts when it feels like I don't
I have been so patient because I do truly understand, but I was expecting you'd be worried about me when situation was so bad yesterday :/
commuting while pak v afg happens, strikes and ab petrol b khatam hone wala
InnshaAllah things will get better for you
how r u mama baba behn doing
n r bhai bhabhi in saudi
4 high alerts have came in since yesterday
They were supposed to come here but they can't now as airspace is closed
Rest up over the weekend your fav time is here
I hope you feel better, periods are the difficult time. I thought they'd come towards the end of month, I'd not have brought it up today if I knew you were on them
If you wanna call and talk, let me know. I hope you do talk about all this stress with someone and not taking it all yourself
bcos soem flights r still coming and going
I'll talk to you about something later, I want to help you get better before it. Call me tonight if you can't sleep, okay
I'm here for you, I've always been
i think u wanted to speak abt smth?
I learnt that periods are not the best time. I'd rather focus the discussion on you rn
What I wanted to say, I already did
There's something else that I'll tell later
But yes I've been really hurt
We can about you if that's okay
Let me in with what you're going through
So you'd like not to share?
its just the same old amplified
Do you do it with someone else?
A daily checkpoint or call sort of thing to talk about your day
Guys heads up - potential fuel shortage. At least in DHA all pumps are chocked. If you can plz go to nearby stations.
Make sure to get it filled and avoid going out
I'll be happy if atleast with me
Things are the same ass old ones
I even did a whole lot of research on that too apart from periods and all😭
It's gonna be fine, people panic and petrol pump owners restrict fuel to sell expensive
keh rhe k monday tak toh khatam hi na hojaye
I guess then I will let you get better
Since you don't want to share or anything
Take your time, get well soon
Yehi ka bhi idea nahi mujhay😂 you don't really share
Also if there's anything else I should know
It got approved internally but then war happened and hiring is delayed now
And sleeping at night and waking up to loud explosions and sirens with high alerts
allah tala sabko apne hifz o aman mai rakhe
Anything else you'd like to ask?
Think about whatever you'd like me to tell
If you'd like me to tell about what's on your mind these days, you can do so too
Again no pressures on that too
Ideally, I'd just want you to
And close eyes and rest up
But if for some reason stress builds up, you can text me to let it out
Your mind is the most expensive hotel in this world, don't let anything here for free
Ik you said you're okay, and you're alhamdulillah. Talking and ranting doesn't make you less okay, but after doing it, you'll feel better and lighter. I listen judgement free

I repeat things I'm sorry but ik you find it hard to open up and talk and I just you to know that this space is and will always be a safe space for you, someone who'd be eager to listen and help you always :)
So don't deprive me of the privilege to be there for u <3
And also don't worry, I'll do extra prayers and ask Allah to give u all the sawab too
thank you maaz you're too sweet MA MA
I just want to make sure you don't worry about anything on your period, and if something worries you, send that bad boy to me and I'll deal w it
I've a lot to infact, get well jaldi se and I'll do
Government raises petrol price by PKR 55 Govt raises Diesel price by PKR 55 New price of petrol is PKR 321 New price of diesel is PKR 335
Govt sees an opportunity to rip people and they take it
JazakAllah, just dont take me for granted ever☹️
I guess some bill also was presented, baba was telling
Ab tou even uber waghera will get super expensive
Imagine adhi salary sirf petrol mein nikal jaye
I pity those jinke offices very far and pays less
Khair now it's more important than ever to be mindful of investment please
Also so much to tell you as you asked
Weather here is very nice and cozy
Yes yahan bhi dopehar mein it's hot
I haven't watched a show since ages
I have been working less, try to give myself time and space
I have been reading about psychology etc too
About a variety of different topics
And when I do, I wanna be sharing it with you, so I document it all
But for the first time in ages was able to start ramadan with family and not alone
But carried bad luck because jaisay hi Qatar aya, yahan pe war hogayee😭
auyy nice back to it MA
Just having some time so yes
Must be the period ache, unable to sleep ig
I'm here if you can't sleep
I hope you're having a relaxing day and feeling better, have a nice weekend
Aj bhi you were away the entire day :( <This message was edited>
I hope it gave you time to rest
Ghar pe rehna chahiye tha na
Just one more to go though
Rest up and enjoy the weekend
Do let me know about your office situation tomorrow
Is there any cool or hot pad in your house and you can access?
I'm here if you can't sleep, wish I could do more but I can talk and cheer u up
I prayed for your pain to soothe abhi in prayer
I'm sure you'd know all of it that I suggest, try resting on your right side
And for the general day, stay hydrated
Hey I found this, not sure if you've seen it but just wanted to share. I hope you're feeling better and had a good day at work

- Pray for hidayat and guidance to the right path - may Allah makes me a good human and good Muslim who's away from all evil, envy, backbiting etc and thinks and does good for others - May Allah grants me, my family, my parents, my siblings, my friends, my closed ones, including the ones who are alive and have passed away, highest ranks in Jannah - May Allah saves me and every muslim from fitnah of dajjal, trials of Hereafter. May Allah saves us from hellfire and qabar azab - May Allah gives me strength to endure the pain and guides me to the right path - May Allah allows me to only earn from halal sources and do a lot of charity and help people in His way - May Allah gives peace and happiness to my parents, and lets me become coolness of their eyes and support them as they have always supported me - May Allah helps me become a source of guidance for my friends and all my loved ones and make me a source of help - May Allah gives me a good naseeb, a righteous spouse, righteous kids and family who become a sadqah jariyah after I pass away - May Allah grants me a good end and blesses me in this world and akhirah - May Allah gives you peace and happiness and always keeps you happy. May He heals all your worries and traumas and makes it easier for you, let's you become a source of pride for your mom. May He heals your mom's heart and hurt and turns it into blessings in this world and grant you and your family Jannah for enduring everything. May He keeps you steadfast and never lose hope in Him - May Allah helps people in Palestine, Iran and everywhere Muslims are in pain and destroys all the evils in US, Israel and all over the world - May Allah accepts all our duas, those we were able to ask and those that are in our heart and couldn't put to words
And also May Allah gives you a good job that you enjoy working as well. I hope you have gotten better and period is over.
What did you use it for
Let me know if you're available tonight
I'd like to talk to you and close out what's been pending for a while
If not available then lmk too
I hope you make the most of them
aur phir wapis office nights kal se
Yeap and then full time office
kuch maza enjoy nai kiya half office time ka
It's okay things will get better for you🫶🏻
I hope there's other fun stuff
i want to quit before mondya
usk ilawa b sab kuch hai
Goodluck with last few nights of ramadan
Is there anything else I should know
jismi i can pray and also stay up and everything
islie a bit hesitant on talking
Talking to me makes it hard?
Oh yeah we had that convo 1.5 weeks back, I thought it'd have ended by 22nd roza
Let me know whenever you'd have some time for me
I promise I'll keep it very short
And then you'll have all the time in the world after it
I prayed for you in every prayer during that time as promised
pls dont say it lile tjat
You don't have time for me at all☹️
It had been for me too, even today we had loud explosions, some places got vacated too. I just wished you'd check on me yourself some time in the month
youvr brrn in each of my prsyers
May Allah accept all your prayers
You've been in each of my prayers too

Remember if you can, do a bit of charity donation or zakat tonight, on 27th and 29th. It felt in the morning of the signs of shabe qadar today, clear sky and sunrays weren't overpowering. It can turn out to be today here as well. You can reference the website I made for you which has all the duas or the website I made for laylatul qadar as well. Make sure to read the dua as much as you can, make sure to also read surah ikhlas as much as you can (reading thrice gives sawab of a whole quran). Try to make duas in sajdah as it's the time you're the closest to him. Start with surah fatiha and his names like Ya Rahman, Ya Raheem Ya Fattah etc (you can even see these in the laylatul qadar website), then offer durud shareef, recite Allah's greatest name and then make all your prayers (ask for impossible and ask with conviction, don't ask with ya Allah give me if this is good, ask with ya Allah make this good for me InnshaAllah. With Allah we have faith so we avoid using the word if) Pray for yourself, specially pray for your job and making it easy or finding something better, your family, your deen and everything you can think of. Make dua for me as well and making everything better. Allahumma barik on you and may Allah guides you and your family to the straight path and turns rough patches into beautiful ways that feel good beyond dreams InnshaAllah
wese morning of means k last night thi
But yes do whatever you can
Allah is saying ask what you want
Imagine praying and donating a single rupee and getting the reward of praying or donating for 83 years
Make dua specially for your heart
Just wanted to leave it here so I could be a part of some sawab of your night InnshaAllah
Now I'll let you focus purely on ibadah🧡
If you wanna ask about something, text me up
I could share ideas of some ways to structure it
Don't say InnshaAllah when praying dua
Because Allah wants you to ask with conviction
I'm excited to see you make the most of it InnshaAllah
